title: delphinium variegatum subsp. variegatum
intro: Delphinium variegatum subsp. variegatum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the variegated delphinium, and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Delphinium variegatum subsp. variegatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
